title: PDF Page 1
content:
Duncan Aviation, Inc. 
DOA Request for Quote 
 
Registration C-GENW Make/Model Falcon 2000EX Serial Number 129 
 
 
Avionics Work Scope:  
 
1.0 Rosen 22" Smart Widescreen, High-Definition LCD Bulkhead Display 
Furnish and install a new Rosen (22") Smart Widescreen, High-Definition LCD Bulkhead Display. 
 
Rosen LCD Displays offer bright, vibrant and glare-free images with "all-cabin" 180 degree viewing 
angle. 
 
System Equipment: 
1ea. Rosen (22") Smart Widescreen , High-Definition LCD Display (w/5yr-Warranty) 
1ea Toggle switch to select input modes for the New monitor. This is required as the existing CMS is 
not capable of this. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Interior Work Scope: 
 
1.0 Upgrade: New One-Piece Modern Duncan-Designed PSU Panels 
The existing cabin valance panels and PSU (passenger service unit) panel will be removed. New Duncan 
Designed one-piece cabin PSU overlay panels will be fabricated and installed. The Duncan PSU overlay 
panels eliminate the center painted PSU panel and the metal painted air return at the top of the previous 
PSU panel. 
 
The modification will also be performed to the RH lavatory valance panel. 
New radiused recessed shrouds will be installed for the lights and airvents to provide an updated 
appearance. The new shrouds for the lights/airvents will be covered with material, (versus being 
painted). 
 
The existing downwash lights, reading lights, air gaspers, oxygen boxes, speakers, etc. will be retained 
and integrated into the new valance panels. 
The existing "EXIT" locater / marker will be retained over the emergency exit. New "No Smoking /

title: PDF Page 2
content:
Fasten Seatbelt" ordinance signs will be installed in the main cabin to comply with current FAR 
requirements.

Furnish and install a new Gogo OnePhone wireless handset for use with the existing Gogo Axxess 
Iridium Satcom System. The Android-based Gogo OnePhone features a bright touchscreen display with 
advanced noise-reduction technology and the very best voice quality. Upgrade the Cockpit and on 
Cabin Handset with the new OnePhone Wireless Handsets. 
 
NOTE: The handsets are equipped with a Lithium Ion, rechargeable Battery.
